title: Angae Ippo Enna Seigiraai Lyrics Irumbu kudhirai song lyrics
singerName: Manasi MM, Mugdha Hasabnis, Vijay Prakash
stanzas:
Song : Angae Ippo Enna Seigiraai
Movie: Irumbu Kudhirai
Singer(s):Vijay Prakash,
Mugdha Hasabnis,M.M.Manasi
Music: G.V.Prakash Kumar
Lyrics : Thamarai


hey anga enna panra
naa thoonga poren
nee innum thoongalaya....

Angea ippo enna seigiraai
aadai maatri thoonga selgiraai..
ennai thoonga poga solgiraai...
pogiren oh....

ennavum peasalam
endrea or ennam thondrudhea.
un manam ennavo
thuzhaavi paarka thondrudhea...
oh... oh.... oh....

Angea ippo enna seigiraai
aadai maatri thoonga selgiraai..
ennai thoonga poga solgiraai...
pogiren oh....

Viral nuni anup-pidum
visaaranai, sugamea...
bathil mozhi varum varai
padum vazhi sugamea...

Oyvillayea viralgaluku..
nogindradhea nagam iduku..
aanalum en sugam irukku..
nenjea... sol....
oh... oh... oh...

Niram edhu.. manam edhu..
pidikkudhu unakku..
karum niram.. kadal manam..
pidikkumea enaku..

Naan kaalaiyil ezhundhadhumea
thaanagavea thalai thirumbum..
un seidhiyai manam virumbum..
yeano... yean.....
oh.... oh... oh....

Angea ippo enna seigiraai
aadai maatri thoonga selgiraai..
ennai thoonga poga solgiraai...
pogiren oh....

ennavum peasalam
endrea or ennam thondrudhea.
un manam ennavo
thuzhaavi paarka thondrudhea...
oh... oh.... oh....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and romance, capturing the emotions of a lover's yearning.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Irumbu Kudhirai, this song highlights a pivotal romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Manasi MM, Mugdha Hasabnis, and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by GV PrakashKumar, known for his innovative soundscapes.

When was this song released?

This song was released on August 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Angae Ippo Enna Seigiraai, the singers beautifully convey a sense of longing and romance that resonates deeply with the audience. The song plays a crucial role in Irumbu Kudhirai, encapsulating the emotional turmoil of love and desire. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Thamarai, it evokes a nostalgic feeling that lingers long after the song ends. This duet is a perfect blend of vocal harmony and musical composition, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Angae Ippo Enna Seigiraai from Irumbu Kudhirai is a mesmerizing blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics that captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Manasi MM, Mugdha Hasabnis, and Vijay Prakash, this song creates a dreamy atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of GV PrakashKumar's music paired with Thamarai's evocative lyrics in this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, what are you doing now? I am going to sleep, are you still awake?
What are you doing now? You are changing your clothes and getting ready to sleep... you are telling me to go to sleep... I will go... oh....
I am saying that we can talk, but it seems like my heart is feeling something. Your heart seems to be looking for something... oh... oh.... oh....
What are you doing now? You are changing your clothes and getting ready to sleep... you are telling me to go to sleep... I will go... oh....
The pain that comes from your fingers is a question, is it good... until the answer comes, the way is good...
For the fingers, there is no pain... but there is a sweetness to it... still, my heart is fine... tell me.... oh... oh... oh...
What color is it... what feeling is it... you like it... the dark color... the sea feeling... do I like it?
I woke up in the morning, and it feels like my head is turning... I like what you do... why... why..... oh.... oh... oh....
What are you doing now? You are changing your clothes and getting ready to sleep... you are telling me to go to sleep... I will go... oh....
I am saying that we can talk, but it seems like my heart is feeling something. Your heart seems to be looking for something... oh... oh.... oh....
